commands_run.notes: Repository test suite passed before final board closeout.
Fixed seed reproduced its intentional B001 gap and passed the private seed oracle.

tests.name: condition-aware scorer and evidence gate tests
tests.notes: Covered committed scope drift, missing baselines, empty handoffs, evidence-gated activation, and seed scoring.

decisions: Use observable git baseline diffs and external private oracle results as deterministic evidence.
Treat unavailable scope baselines as not evaluated instead of granting full credit.
Require non-empty schema-valid handoffs before full BoardFlow dependency activation.
Require external score evidence to match task, condition, baseline, seed SHA, and oracle pack commit.
next_recommended_step: Use the deterministic scorer as the blocking acceptance gate and keep qualitative reviewer findings separate.
